rationale: Educ. Code §38.022 governs school district visitor identification and security policies. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 38.022. SCHOOL VISITORS. (a) A school district may require a person who enters property under the district's control to display the person's driver's license
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns school visitor ID requirements and sex-offender verification, not property tax exemptions or homestead appraisal values.
